scripts.deps: bun scripts/dep-graph.mjs && bun scripts/purge-ratchet.mjs && bun scripts/tcb-audit.mjs --json
scripts.deps:check: bun scripts/dep-graph.mjs --check && bun scripts/purge-ratchet.mjs --check && bun scripts/tcb-audit.mjs --check
scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:native && bun run build:wasm
scripts.build:web: bun run build:web-kernel && bun run --filter covalence-web build
scripts.build:web-kernel: cargo build -p covalence-web-kernel --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && bun scripts/wasm-bindgen.mjs target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/covalence_web_kernel.wasm --out-dir apps/covalence-web/src/lib/kernel --target web --omit-default-module-path && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-reference-types --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int -o apps/covalence-web/src/lib/kernel/covalence_web_kernel_bg.wasm apps/covalence-web/src/lib/kernel/covalence_web_kernel_bg.wasm
scripts.build:serve: bun run build:web && cargo build -p covalence
scripts.serve: bun run build:native && bun run build:web-kernel && bun scripts/dev-serve.mjs
scripts.serve:release: bun run release:native && bun run build:web-kernel && bun scripts/dev-serve.mjs --release
scripts.dev:serve: echo 'Run cov serve --api in another terminal, then:' && bun run dev:web
scripts.release: bun run build:web && bun run release:native && bun run release:wasm
scripts.dev: echo 'Use: bun run code:browser or bun run code:desktop' && exit 1
scripts.code:browser: bun run build:wasm && bun run --filter covalence-vscode code:browser
scripts.code:desktop: bun run build && bun run --filter covalence-vscode code:desktop
scripts.build:python: cd crates/ffi/python && source activate.sh && maturin develop
scripts.test:python: cd crates/ffi/python && source activate.sh && pytest tests/ -v
